textByHashes.8b54d38c051e1c4c2809c9dd9bf808acba0b0db7: Then we have nothing to discuss.
textByHashes.d95e378fff2ac5b042065b4bcc4a28860125055f: Not nearly enough, we have nothing to discuss.
textByHashes.c1b8cd4cbe047c061d1cb9a11c083e2d354701ae: I'd rather not waste time in conversation with someone who can't pay for information.
textByHashes.6c53651576f7dc1f10e75aa025e6dfaadb0cb3af: You travelling types, all you have is questions.
textByHashes.2d18014b8d1308ec711f8f6f4c2b58516a5345d6: The jester? The journey has put him off performing, for the better, I'd say.
textByHashes.0b86ea345f16bbdc891a8ca02c4388aa09a8981a: Oh yes, he came with us. He tends to find himself in strange situations, but he can handle himself.
